title: Vee Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation followed by leveraged trading on newly created trading pairs

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates prices in newly created trading pairs and then conducts leveraged trading on those pairs

red_flags: Price manipulation through trading pairs creation
summary: The attacker manipulated prices in newly created trading pairs and conducted leveraged trading, allowing them to bypass slippage checks and steal funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring price manipulation followed by leveraged trading on newly created pairs.
